en: OK, you lovely lot. Advanced British English pronunciation of the word lasagne.
I ate it for my lunch today. It's an Italian pasta. It's got three syllables, guys.
So, if you're having lunch today, you're going out to a restaurant,
you can ask for lasagne and be able to pronounce it correctly.
That's what I do. I teach British English and I teach you how to pronounce it
so that native speakers can understand you better.
